Bindings.Binding: if InCombatLockdown() then return end if not ElvUI then return end local E = unpack(ElvUI) if not E or not E.db or not E.db.actionbar then return end local bars = { 1, 4, 5, 6 } local hidden = false for _, id in ipairs(bars) do local cfg = E.db.actionbar["bar" .. id] if cfg and cfg.visibility == "hide" then hidden = true break end end local newVis = hidden and "[petbattle]hide;show" or "hide" for _, id in ipairs(bars) do local cfg = E.db.actionbar["bar" .. id] if cfg then cfg.visibility = newVis if E.ActionBars and E.ActionBars.PositionAndSizeBar then E.ActionBars:PositionAndSizeBar("bar" .. id) end end end
